steps.title: Track the authority transfers
steps.content: The student wants the order in which government entities received authority to regulate airline safety. The notes show the US Commerce Department had authority first, the CAA received it in 1938, and the FAA received it in 1958.

steps.title: Reject incomplete sequences
steps.content: A reverses the 1958 transfer and incorrectly credits Navarro. B names the entities but gives no order. C mentions only the FAA and omits the earlier transfers. The correct sentence must show Commerce Department to CAA, then CAA to FAA, with the years. The answer is D.
